creator: eduardo.viruena@esfm.ipn.mx
text:
There are several lib files for rosegarden that are in a wrong place.
According to the package, "lib" directory "/usr/local/lib/X11/rosegarden"
but it must be "/usr/X11/lib/rosegarden"

Another file in a wrong place is 
"/usr/local/lib/X11/app-defaults/Rosegarden"
it must be "/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/app-defaults/Rosegarden"

Fix: 

build symbolic links for the files above.
How-To-Repeat: just install the package and try to run "rosegarden"
